recommendations.title: Benny & Joon
recommendations.overview: A mentally ill young woman finds her love in an eccentric man who models himself after Buster Keaton.

recommendations.title: The Right Kind of Wrong
recommendations.overview: A stubborn idealist spies a bride on her way to her wedding and immediately falls in love with her.

recommendations.title: Diabolique
recommendations.overview: The wife and mistress of a cruel school master collaborate in a carefully planned and executed scheme to murder him. The plan goes well until the body, which has been strategically dumped, disappears. The psychological strain starts to weigh on the t

recommendations.title: The Avengers
recommendations.genres: Action, Adventure, Thriller, Science Fiction, Comedy
recommendations.overview: British Ministry agent John Steed, under direction from "Mother", investigates a diabolical plot by arch-villain Sir August de Wynter to rule the world with his weather control machine. Steed investigates the beautiful Doctor Mrs. Emma Peel, the only

recommendations.title: National Lampoon's Vacation
recommendations.overview: Clark Griswold is on a quest to take his family to the Walley World theme park for a vacation, but things don't go exactly as planned.

recommendations.title: Superman
recommendations.overview: Mild-mannered Clark Kent works as a reporter at the Daily Planet alongside his crush, Lois Lane. Clark must summon his superhero alter-ego when the nefarious Lex Luthor launches a plan to take over the world.

recommendations.title: Behind the Curve
recommendations.overview: Meet the growing, worldwide community of theorists who defend the belief that the Earth is flat while living in a society who vehemently rejects it.

recommendations.title: The Grinch
recommendations.overview: The Grinch hatches a scheme to ruin Christmas when the residents of Whoville plan their annual holiday celebration.

recommendations.title: My Mom Is a Character
recommendations.overview: After another spat with her kids, Dona Hermínia decides to take some time off from them and hides away in her aunt's house, where she reminisces about her kids in an age when they still needed her.

recommendations.title: Racing Extinction
recommendations.overview: An unlikely team of activists and innovators hatches a bold mission to save endangered species.
